_mock_only_notice: > MOCK ONLY — NOT FOR PUBLICATION. Synthetic lab. Deterministic fixture, not a model. No real models, real vouchers, real claimants, real payments, real fraud accusations, or official action. Do not quote, screenshot, or share any portion of this bundle as evidence of model behavior.
